_note: NORMATIVE-REFERENCE per-layer signal field vocabulary (Phaedo Protocol §4.2, resolving open question 13 for all eight layers — the per-signal SHAPE is fingerprint.schema.json#/$defs/signal, generalizing §4.2.7; the per-layer FIELD set is here). Generated from the reference extraction catalog (extraction/catalog.js) and kept in sync by spec/test-schemas.mjs. All eight layers are BEHAVIORAL/persona layers: per §4.6 they admit structured signals only, never episodic content. Questionnaire-projected fields (e.g. collaboration_drains/collaboration_energizers) are additionally valid; an unknown field is not a conformance failure (the vocabulary evolves), but episodic content IS (§4.6).
